category_sources: Official Inko repository says Inko is a language for building concurrent software with confidence.
source_facts.description says Inko is a safe and concurrent object-oriented programming language.
display_name_sources: Official website and official GitHub README use the name Inko.
docs_sources: Official Inko documentation page links the manual and standard library docs.
Official Inko manual describes getting started, references, compiler, and standard library information.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README identifies the repository as Inko and links the official documentation.
Official Inko website links to the inko-lang/inko GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README mentions static typing, type-safe concurrency, LLVM compilation, and compiler/runtime docs.
source_facts.description identifies programming language, safety, concurrency, and object-oriented design.
source_facts.executables lists inko as a CLI executable.
